name: fixing-claude-export-conversations
description: > Fixes broken line wrapping in Claude Code exported conversation files (.txt), reconstructing tables, paragraphs, paths, and tool calls that were hard-wrapped at fixed column widths. Includes an automated validation suite (generic, file-agnostic checks). Triggers when the user has a Claude Code export file with broken formatting, mentions "fix export", "fix conversation", "exported conversation", "make export readable", references a file matching YYYY-MM-DD-HHMMSS-*.txt, or has a .txt file with
author: daymade
